title: DURATECH 12-Piece Combination Spanner Set, Open End Wrench Set, Matte Chrome-Plated, Chrome Vanadium Steel, DIN 3113, Metric, 6-22mm, 12-Point, with Storage Pouch
features: Premium Material: This combination spanner set is made of high quality chrome vanadium steel, with a matte chrome finish, rust resistant and durable, leaving less dirt and grease compared to polished finishes. Complies with the DIN 3113 standard.

Common Sizes: We selected 12 sizes you will need most often: 6mm, 7mm, 8 mm, 9mm, 10 mm, 11 mm, 12 mm, 13 mm, 14 mm, 17 mm, 19mm, 22mm. Combination spanner sizes are stamped on both sides of the handle for easier size identification.

Work Efficiently: The box end of combination spanner set is offset 15 degrees to create clearance for fingers and make it easier to reach obstructions around. Precision 12-point box end allows easy fastener engagement without slippage and prevents fastener round-off.

Easy to Carry: The metric combination spanner set comes with an organizer bag with each wrench size printed on it, which can help you protect your combination wrench and keep them all in good shape. It can be hung and carried easily.
Meet Your Needs: A set of high-quality combination spanner can save your time and help you complete your work easily. It is a great choice for home, DIY or beginner auto mechanics.
description: Product Description Combination Spanner Set 12-Piece Complies with the DIN 3113 standard Metric, 6-22mm, Chrome Vanadium Steel, Matte Chrome-Plated Product Features Matte Chrome-Plated Rust resistant and durable, leaving less dirt and grease compared to polished finishes 12-Point Box End Precision 12-point box end allows easy fastener engagement without slippage and prevents fastener round-off 15° Offset Ring End The box end of combination spanner is offset 15 degrees to create clearance for fingers and make it easier to reach obstructions around 15° Angled Open End Creates more turning space in tight workspaces With Carry Pouch Wide Application
